name: Banana-Strawberry Shake
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the ice cubes to the blender.
2. Pour in the skim milk.
3. Cut and add the very ripe banana into the blender.
4. Chop or muddle the strawberries and add them to the blender.
5. Sprinkle the instant nonfat dry milk over the ingredients.
6. Drizzle a few drops of vanilla extract.
7. Blend on high speed until all the ice is crushed and the mixture is slushy.
8. Serve immediately.
